blocker: synthesized-harness extension only: Anthropic credits exhausted (HTTP 400) so the haiku mutation operator was swapped to gateway deepseek-v4-pro, which returned an empty rule-set; the is_safe headline (the task's literal ask) is fully met and LLM-independent
one_line: Ran harness_synth machinery over all 42 incidents (580 labeled examples) via an import-only runner (no core edits): hand-written is_safe accuracy is 0.933 on the full 42-set (37 false-allows/580) vs 0.871 on the small 10-incident split; LLM synthesis ran but produced no improving rules under the gateway fallback.
